title: Warm Roasted Syrian Yogurt Bake
description: Funky, shaggy, solo-dinner Syrian dish featuring natural yogurt, wok-hei, dairy-free-friendly. Perfect for a cozy evening meal.
instructions: Rinse the cauliflower and remove leaves and stem.
Toss the cauliflower with olive oil, salt, black pepper, and paprika in a large bowl until the florets are evenly coated.
Transfer the cauliflower mixture to a baking dish and roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the cauliflower from the oven and stir in the chopped fresh parsley and fresh mint.
In a separate bowl, mix together the natural yogurt and lemon juice.
Pour the yogurt mixture over the roasted cauliflower and stir to combine.
Sprinkle the chopped almonds over the top of the yogurt and cauliflower mixture.
Transfer the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional chopped parsley and mint if desired.
